text:
(In reply to Dmitry Chagin from comment #1)
Same :(

Before, linuxulator sound that used pulseaudio 'just worked' if pulseaudio was also installed on native FreeBSD.

I guess it must be a certain commit common to both 13.2-RELEASE-p3 and 14.0-RC3/RC4. Maybe security-related?
